channel.title: Risk on Dr. Soumyo Maity
channel.description: Recent content in Risk on Dr. Soumyo Maity

item.title: Risk Assessment
item.description: Risk assessment is the process of identifying, assessing, and mitigating risks. It is a critical part of any organization’s security program. There are a number of steps involved in risk assessment, including: Identifying assets: The first step is to identify the assets that need to be protected. This could include things like data, systems, facilities, and employees. Identifying threats: The next step is to identify the threats that could impact the assets.
